cheatSheet.title: Reported Speech
keyPoints: Tense backshift: present → past, past → past perfect, will → would, can → could
Pronoun changes: I → he/she, my → his/her, we → they, our → their
Time changes: today → that day, now → then, yesterday → the day before, tomorrow → the next day
Place changes: here → there, this → that, these → those
'that' có thể lược bỏ: He said (that) he was tired.
commonMistakes: 'He said he is tired' → 'He said he was tired' (quên lùi thì)
'She said me she was happy' → 'She told me she was happy' (said + that, told + người nghe)
'He said that I am a teacher' → 'He said that he was a teacher' (quên đổi đại từ)
'She said she will come tomorrow' → 'She said she would come the next day' (quên đổi will → would, tomorrow → the next day)

sections.heading: Cấu trúc câu tường thuật
sections.content:
**Câu trực tiếp (Direct Speech):** Lời nói nguyên văn, đặt trong dấu ngoặc kép.
**Câu tường thuật (Reported Speech):** Thuật lại lời nói, không dùng dấu ngoặc kép.

**Công thức:**
- **said:** S + said + (that) + S + V(backshift)
- **told:** S + told + người nghe + (that) + S + V(backshift)

**Lưu ý:** 'said' không có tân ngữ trực tiếp. 'told' luôn có tân ngữ (người nghe).

examples.en:
Direct: "I **am** happy."
Reported: She **said** (that) she **was** happy.
examples.vi: Cô ấy nói rằng cô ấy vui.

examples.en:
Direct: "I **like** coffee."
Reported: He **told** me (that) he **liked** coffee.
examples.vi: Anh ấy nói với tôi rằng anh ấy thích cà phê.

parts.tooltip: Đại từ đã đổi: I → she

coloredExamples.vi: Cô ấy nói rằng cô ấy vui.

parts.tooltip: Động từ tường thuật (told + người nghe)
Đại từ đã đổi: I → he

coloredExamples.vi: Anh ấy nói với tôi rằng anh ấy thích cà phê.

beforeAfter.wrong: She said me that she was happy.
beforeAfter.correct: She told me that she was happy.
beforeAfter.explanation: 'said' không đi với tân ngữ trực tiếp. Dùng 'told + người nghe' hoặc 'said + that'.

beforeAfter.wrong: He said that I am a teacher.
beforeAfter.correct: He said that he was a teacher.
beforeAfter.explanation: Phải đổi đại từ (I → he) và lùi thì (am → was) khi chuyển sang câu tường thuật.

sections.heading: Quy tắc lùi thì (Tense Backshift)
sections.content:
Khi động từ tường thuật ở quá khứ (said, told), thì trong câu tường thuật phải lùi một bậc:

| Direct Speech | Reported Speech |
|---|---|
| Present Simple (am/is/are, V1) | Past Simple (was/were, V2) |
| Present Continuous (am/is/are + V-ing) | Past Continuous (was/were + V-ing) |
| Past Simple (V2) | Past Perfect (had + V3) |
| Present Perfect (have/has + V3) | Past Perfect (had + V3) |
| will | would |
| can | could |
| may | might |
| must | had to |

examples.vi: Anh ấy nói anh ấy làm việc ở đó. (Present → Past)
Cô ấy nói cô ấy đang học. (Present Continuous → Past Continuous)

examples.en: "I **bought** a car." → He said he **had bought** a car.
examples.vi: Anh ấy nói anh ấy đã mua xe. (Past → Past Perfect)
Cô ấy nói cô ấy sẽ đến. (will → would)
Anh ấy nói anh ấy có thể bơi. (can → could)

parts.tooltip: Đại từ đã đổi: I → he
Lùi thì: bought (past) → had bought (past perfect)

coloredExamples.vi: Anh ấy nói anh ấy đã mua xe.

parts.tooltip: Đại từ đã đổi: I → she

coloredExamples.vi: Cô ấy nói cô ấy sẽ đến.

beforeAfter.explanation: Khi động từ tường thuật ở quá khứ (said), phải lùi thì: is → was.

beforeAfter.wrong: She said she will come tomorrow.
beforeAfter.correct: She said she would come the next day.
beforeAfter.explanation: will → would (lùi thì), tomorrow → the next day (đổi trạng từ thời gian).

sections.heading: Đổi đại từ, trạng từ thời gian và nơi chốn
sections.content:
**Đại từ:**
- I → he/she
- my → his/her
- me → him/her
- we → they
- our → their
- us → them

**Trạng từ thời gian:**
- today → that day
- tonight → that night
- yesterday → the day before / the previous day
- tomorrow → the next day / the following day
- last week → the week before / the previous week
- next month → the following month
- ago → before / earlier
- now → then

**Trạng từ nơi chốn:**
- here → there
- this → that
- these → those

examples.en: "I will call you **today**." → She said she would call me **that day**.
examples.vi: Cô ấy nói cô ấy sẽ gọi cho tôi ngày hôm đó.

examples.en: "**My** sister lives **here**." → He said **his** sister lived **there**.
examples.vi: Anh ấy nói chị gái anh ấy sống ở đó.

examples.en: "I saw them **yesterday**." → She said she had seen them **the day before**.
examples.vi: Cô ấy nói cô ấy đã gặp họ ngày hôm trước.

examples.en: "We are leaving **tomorrow**." → They said they were leaving **the next day**.
examples.vi: Họ nói họ sẽ rời đi ngày hôm sau.

coloredExamples.vi: Cô ấy nói cô ấy sẽ gọi cho tôi ngày hôm đó.

parts.tooltip: my → his (đổi tính từ sở hữu)

coloredExamples.vi: Anh ấy nói chị gái anh ấy sống ở đó.

beforeAfter.wrong: He said that my sister lives here.
beforeAfter.correct: He said that his sister lived there.
beforeAfter.explanation: Phải đổi: my → his (đại từ sở hữu), lives → lived (lùi thì), here → there (nơi chốn).

beforeAfter.wrong: She said she had seen them yesterday.
beforeAfter.correct: She said she had seen them the day before.
beforeAfter.explanation: yesterday → the day before / the previous day (đổi trạng từ thời gian).

exercises.question: "I am tired." → She said she ___ tired.
"I will help you." → He said he ___ help me.
"We are leaving tomorrow." → They said they were leaving ___.
She ___ me that she was busy.
"I like chocolate." → She said she ___ chocolate.
"I can speak French." → He said he ___ speak French.
"I bought a new phone." → She said she ___ a new phone.

exercises.sentence: He said me that he was busy.
exercises.correctSentence: He told me that he was busy.

exercises.sentence: She said she will come the next day.
exercises.correctSentence: She said she would come the next day.

exercises.sentence: He said that I was a doctor.
exercises.correctSentence: He said that he was a doctor.

exercises.answer: She said that she was tired.
He told me he could swim.

exercises.instruction: Chuyển câu trực tiếp sang câu tường thuật (dùng 'said').
acceptedAnswers: He said he was studying English.
She said she was studying English.
He said that he was studying English.
She said that she was studying English.
exercises.hint: am studying → was studying (lùi thì), I → he/she (đổi đại từ).

exercises.instruction: Chuyển câu trực tiếp sang câu tường thuật (dùng 'told me').
acceptedAnswers: He told me he would call me the next day.
She told me she would call me the next day.
He told me that he would call me the next day.
She told me that she would call me the next day.
He told me he would call me the following day.
She told me she would call me the following day.
exercises.hint: will → would, you → me, tomorrow → the next day.

exercises.instruction: Chuyển câu trực tiếp sang câu tường thuật (dùng 'said').
acceptedAnswers: He said he had finished his homework.
She said she had finished her homework.
He said that he had finished his homework.
She said that she had finished her homework.
exercises.hint: have finished → had finished (lùi thì), my → his/her (đổi đại từ sở hữu).
